inputs.name: project_dir
inputs.description: Project directory to monitor for changes

verify-change.description: Runs relevant tests, checks for regressions, and verifies the change actually works

activities.intent: Run the test suite to confirm all existing tests still pass after the change
steps: Identify which tests are relevant to the changed code
Run the full test suite
Flag any test failures or new warnings

activities.intent: Verify that existing functionality was not broken by the change
steps: Compare behavior before and after the change for affected areas
Check edge cases and boundary conditions related to the change
Verify no unintended side effects in dependent code

activities.intent: Confirm the change accomplishes what it was supposed to do
steps: Review the intent of the change against the actual result
Test the happy path end-to-end
Document evidence that the change works as expected

pre-deploy-check.description: Full verification suite before any deployment — tests, build, integration checks, and final sign-off

activities.intent: Run the complete test suite and verify all tests pass
steps: Run all unit tests
Run all integration tests
Verify test coverage meets minimum thresholds

activities.intent: Confirm the project builds cleanly with no errors or warnings
steps: Run a clean build from scratch
Check for build warnings that could indicate problems
Verify all dependencies resolve correctly

activities.intent: Verify integrations and external dependencies are functioning
steps: Check API endpoints respond correctly
Verify database migrations are up to date
Confirm environment configuration is correct for the target environment

activities.intent: Produce a deploy readiness report with pass/fail status and any risks
steps: Summarize all test results and build status
List any known risks or caveats
Provide a clear go/no-go recommendation with evidence

debug-issue.description: Systematic 4-phase debugging: investigate, hypothesize, test, verify

activities.intent: Reproduce the issue and gather all available evidence
steps: Reproduce the reported issue with specific steps
Collect error messages, logs, and stack traces
Identify the scope — what works, what does not, when it started

activities.intent: Form ranked hypotheses about the root cause based on evidence
steps: List all possible causes based on the evidence collected
Rank hypotheses by likelihood using available data
Identify the simplest test to confirm or rule out each hypothesis

activities.intent: Systematically test each hypothesis starting with the most likely
steps: Test the most likely hypothesis first
Record results — confirmed or ruled out
If ruled out, move to the next hypothesis
Once root cause is confirmed, implement the fix

activities.intent: Confirm the fix resolves the issue without introducing new problems
steps: Verify the original issue is resolved
Run related tests to confirm no regressions
Add a test that would catch this issue if it recurs
Document the root cause and fix for future reference

post-deploy-monitor.description: Monitors for errors after deployment and alerts if something breaks

activities.intent: Verify the deployment is healthy and core functionality works
steps: Check that the application is running and responding
Verify core user flows work end-to-end
Monitor error logs for new or increased error rates

activities.intent: Scan for new errors, exceptions, or performance degradation introduced by the deployment
steps: Compare error rates before and after deployment
Check for new error types that did not exist before
Monitor response times for significant changes
If errors found, collect evidence and prepare a diagnostic summary
